CVE-2023-6110.title: A flaw was found in OpenStack. When a user tries to delete a non- ...
CVE-2023-6110.summary: A flaw was found in OpenStack. When a user tries to delete a non-existing access rule in it's scope, it deletes other existing access rules which are not associated with any application credentials.
